episodes.title: Episode 16: The Cult of Nature Boy | Cults in the Black Community
episodes.description: Episode 16: The Cult of Nature Boy | Cults in the Black Community In 2017, a man named Eligio Bishop — known online as Nature Boy — was building a following inside a Black community that was grieving, afraid, and looking for safety. The world was giving them every reason to distrust the system. He used that. And it worked. This week, Aqueelah and Ashley break down the Hulu documentary The Cult of Nature Boy — the psychology behind why people join cults, why Black Americans were specifically vulnerable in that moment in history, and what the research says about the tactics used to pull people in and keep them there. Also Aqueelah shares something she's never talked about publicly. Something that could have gone differently and very left. Two things can be true: the community was not wrong about the world. They were wrong about him. Watch The Cult of Nature Boy on Hulu before or after — either way, let's talk about it. 📲 Come to the Group Chat. Drop your thoughts. We read everything. _______________ @ twothingscanbetrue.podcast
